verses.text: Woe to the land of whirring wings beyond Ethiopia, sending swift messengers; all the world is bid to watch when the LORD lifts His ensign. God calls the nations to attend. He directs the affairs of distant peoples for His own ends.

Woe to the land of whirring wings beyond Ethiopia, sending swift messengers; all the world is bid to watch when the LORD lifts His ensign. God calls the nations to attend. He directs the affairs of distant peoples for His own ends.

Woe to the land of whirring wings beyond Ethiopia, sending swift messengers; all the world is bid to watch when the LORD lifts His ensign. God calls the nations to attend. He directs the affairs of distant peoples for His own ends.

The LORD says He will quietly observe from His dwelling, then before the harvest cut off the sprigs and branches, left to the birds and beasts. He waits, then acts decisively. God's patience is not idleness; He prunes at the appointed time.

The LORD says He will quietly observe from His dwelling, then before the harvest cut off the sprigs and branches, left to the birds and beasts. He waits, then acts decisively. God's patience is not idleness; He prunes at the appointed time.

The LORD says He will quietly observe from His dwelling, then before the harvest cut off the sprigs and branches, left to the birds and beasts. He waits, then acts decisively. God's patience is not idleness; He prunes at the appointed time.

In that time a present shall be brought to the LORD of hosts at mount Zion from a scattered and feared people. The nations bring tribute to God. Even distant peoples shall one day honour the LORD in His holy place.
